Where knowledge becomes

features.title: We understand what matters to Teachers
features.subtitle: Tools and features designed to help you succeed

feature1.title: Easy Course Creation
feature1.description: Powerful editor helps you create professional content

feature2.title: Detailed Analytics
feature2.description: Track course performance and understand your students

feature3.title: Secure Payments
feature3.description: Receive payments quickly and securely from students

trust.title: Trust Built from How We Operate
trust.description: We believe Teachers can only partner with peace of mind when the platform is designed transparently, consistently and responsibly for long-term value.

card1.title: Long-term orientation, not following trends
card1.description: We don't build platforms for short-term campaigns. Every product decision is aimed at helping Teachers accumulate sustainable value over time.

card2.title: AI tools serve real value
card2.description: AI tools are used directly in SME operations, ensuring teaching content is always connected to practice.

card3.title: Transparency is a principle, not a feature
card3.description: All data related to students, progress and revenue is displayed clearly, with context and can be verified

card4.title: Respect Teacher ownership
card4.description: Teachers have full rights to content, teaching methods and course development. The platform plays a supporting infrastructure and tool role, without interfering with expertise.

aiTools.title: AI Tools Suite to Help Teachers Enhance Teaching Expertise
aiTools.description: We provide AI support tools so teachers can not only teach better, but also understand more deeply about real-world problems, data and industry trends.

testimonials.title: What Teachers Say After Working with the Platform
testimonials.description: The following shares come from real experiences in building, operating and developing courses on the platform.

items.name: Tran Thi Mai
items.comment: Classify feels like a real workspace, not just a place to post lectures. I can track the development of each course and improve content based on concrete data.

items.name: Le Van Son
items.comment: The AI tools significantly reduce the time I spend on repetitive tasks like tracking progress or compiling assignments. This gives me more time to focus on content quality and student interaction.

items.name: Pham Thu Ha
items.comment: I appreciate how Classify presents data. Everything from students, progress to revenue is clear and easy to understand, giving me confidence to view teaching as a long-term activity.

items.name: Nguyen Minh Tuan
items.comment: The platform helps me manage courses much more effectively. Clear dashboard, detailed data, and especially I can interact directly with students in a professional manner.

items.name: Hoang Thi Lan
items.comment: I love how the system automates many complex tasks. From grading to tracking student progress, everything is handled intelligently and accurately.

items.name: Dang Quoc Huy
items.comment: The student analytics tool is very detailed. I can know exactly which students are struggling where and adjust my teaching methods accordingly.

items.name: Vo Thi Huong
items.comment: Beautiful interface, easy to use and very professional. My students are also very satisfied with the learning experience on this platform.

items.name: Bui Van Thanh
items.comment: The revenue reporting system is transparent and detailed. I always know the financial situation and can plan long-term course development.

items.name: Ly Thanh Nga
items.comment: The direct interaction feature with students is excellent. I can answer questions, give assignment feedback and track each person's learning progress easily.

items.name: Phan Duc Anh
items.comment: This platform helps me build my personal brand effectively. From the profile page to course presentation, everything is very professional and attractive.

items.name: Truong Thi Mai Anh
items.comment: The AI content creation support tools are very useful. I save a lot of time in preparing lectures and learning materials.

items.name: Duong Van Long
items.comment: The student management system is very powerful. I can segment, tag and track each student group in detail and systematically.

items.name: Ho Thi Phuong
items.comment: I value the quiz and assignment creation features. Students can self-test their knowledge and I can easily assess their learning effectiveness.

items.name: Ngo Minh Duc
items.comment: The platform helps me scale courses easily. From tens to hundreds of students, the system still runs smoothly and stably.

items.name: Vu Thi Thanh
items.comment: The media upload and management features are very convenient. I can share high-quality images and videos without worrying about storage or loading speed.

cta.title: We seriously partner with Teachers
cta.description: If you want to build a sustainable educational asset, {platform} is designed to support you in doing that.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about becoming a teacher on the 5200AI platform. If you have other questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.q1: How do I register to become a teacher on 5200AI?
faq.a1: You can register to become a teacher by clicking the "Apply Now" button on this page or visiting the registration page and selecting the "Teacher" role. After filling in your basic information and verifying your email, you will be redirected to the teacher dashboard to start creating your first course.
faq.q2: What are the requirements to become a teacher on 5200AI?
faq.a2: 5200AI does not require specific degrees, but you need to have professional knowledge and practical experience in the field you want to teach. We encourage teachers to have at least 2-3 years of work experience or previous teaching experience. Most importantly, you should have a passion for sharing knowledge and be committed to creating quality content for students.
faq.q3: How much will I earn from my courses?
faq.a3: Teachers have the right to set their own course prices. Revenue is shared transparently and you can track details in your dashboard. The payment system is automated and you can withdraw funds according to the agreed cycle. All information about revenue, students, and payments is clearly displayed in the financial management section.
faq.q4: What AI tools are available to support teachers?
faq.a4: 5200AI provides a diverse suite of AI tools to support teachers in content creation, course management, and student interaction. Tools include: lecture writing assistance, automatic quiz and assignment generation, student progress analysis, content improvement suggestions based on data, and automation of repetitive tasks. You can also request custom tool design tailored to your teaching methods.
faq.q5: Do I own the content of my courses?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Teachers retain full intellectual property rights to their course content. 5200AI only serves as a platform providing infrastructure and support tools. You have the right to decide on teaching methods, course development approaches, and can remove courses from the platform at any time. We are committed to respecting teacher ownership.
faq.q6: How can I get support when I encounter issues?
faq.a6: You can contact the 5200AI support team through multiple channels: support email, online chat in the dashboard, or schedule a consultation for custom teaching tool design. We also provide detailed documentation and video tutorials to help you get familiar with the platform. The support team is always ready to answer all your questions.

weUnderstand.title: We understand what matters to Teachers
weUnderstand.description: When building 5200AI, we don't focus on content quantity, but on the ability to help Teachers define their value and develop sustainably.

card1.title: You don't build everything alone

card2.title: Income needs to be measured transparently and systematically
card2.description: Track revenue by course and over time, with transparent and easy-to-understand status so you always know the value you are creating

card3.title: Data serves your decisions
card3.description: Information about students, learning progress, evaluations and revenue is displayed consistently, helping you understand the actual situation and make more confident decisions.

reviews.title: Student Reviews
reviews.courseName: 📚 Course name from basic to advanced
reviews.review1: The Machine Learning course here completely changed my perspective on AI. The teacher is very enthusiastic, the content is up-to-date and practical. After 6 months, I moved to a Data Scientist position!
reviews.review2: I used to think AI was difficult and only for technical people, but this course explains it very clearly. After learning, I realized AI can be applied immediately to daily work.
reviews.review3: The course helped me save a lot of operational time by applying AI to work processes. The automation part is especially useful.

learnerPolicy.title: Learner Policy

section1.title: 1. Platform information and Learner role
section1.p1: 5200AI is a technology platform that connects Learners with online courses provided by Teachers, experts or training organizations.
section1.p2: 5200AI does not teach directly, does not commit to replacing the role of Teachers, and does not guarantee absolute individual learning outcomes.
section1.p3: Learners participating on the platform are defined as users of the learning service, with the right to choose courses, Teachers and learning paths that suit their personal needs.

section2.title: 2. Learner rights
section2.item1: Access to course content as described in the published information
section2.item2: Learning according to a clear, transparent path
section2.item3: Providing feedback and evaluating course and Teacher quality after completion
section2.item4: Protection of their interests by the 5200AI platform in case of legitimate disputes
section2.closing: 5200AI applies a revenue recognition mechanism based on course completion to protect Learner interests and reduce the risk of paying for courses without receiving commensurate value.

section3.title: 3. Learner obligations and responsibilities
section3.resp1: Providing accurate personal information when registering an account
section3.resp2: Actively participating in learning according to the course path
section3.resp3: Completing lessons, assignments and confirming course completion on the system
section3.resp4: Using course content for personal learning purposes only
section3.prob1: Copy, share or distribute course content to third parties in any form
section3.prob2: Use course content for commercial purposes without written permission from the Teacher and/or 5200AI
section3.prob3: Engage in disruptive, offensive or abusive behavior towards Teachers, other Learners or the platform system

section4.title: 4. Payment and course usage policy
section4.intro: When registering and paying for a course on the 5200AI platform, Learners understand and agree that:
section4.bullet1: The fee paid is the cost of using the learning service
section4.bullet2: Course access is granted according to the duration and specific conditions of each course
section4.resp1: Actively participating in learning while the course is still valid
section4.resp2: Fulfilling all learning requirements to be confirmed as having completed the course
section4.closing: Failure to participate in learning or to complete the course due to the Learner's own reasons shall not be grounds for a refund request, except as provided in Section 5.

section5.title: 5. Feedback, complaints and dispute resolution
section5.intro: Learners have the right to send feedback or complaints to 5200AI in the following cases:
section5.item1: Course content does not match the published description
section5.item2: Course quality does not meet a reasonable level compared to commitments
section5.item3: Signs of fraud, spam or fraudulent conduct by the Teacher
section5.process2: Temporarily freeze revenue of the reported course (if necessary)
section5.process3: Coordinate with the Teacher to clarify the issue
section5.timeNote: Verification time normally does not exceed 15 working days from the date of receiving a valid response.
section5.result1: Maintaining the course outcome if no violation is found
section5.result2: Applying appropriate remedial or support measures for the Learner
section5.result3: Applying sanctions against the Teacher if policy violations are found

section6.title: 6. Limitation of 5200AI platform liability
section6.item1: The specific learning outcomes of each Learner
section6.item2: Personal, career or financial decisions of Learners after completing a course
section6.item3: Disputes arising outside the scope of the platform or unrelated to the use of 5200AI services
section6.closing: 5200AI acts as an intermediary in support, ensuring a transparent learning environment, but does not replace the individual responsibility of Learners in the learning process.

section7.title: 7. Compliance with laws and related regulations
section7.item1: Complying with current laws when using the platform
section7.item2: Not using the platform for illegal purposes
section7.item3: Respecting the intellectual property rights of Teachers and 5200AI
section7.consequenceLabel: In case of serious or repeated violations by the Learner, 5200AI has the right to:
section7.cons2: Revoke course access without refunding fees already paid

section8.title: 8. Effectiveness and acknowledgment
section8.body: A Learner creating an account, enrolling in a course or using services on the 5200AI platform is deemed to have read, understood and agreed to the entire content of this Learner Policy.

learnerPolicy.agreement: By registering, you agree to the policies above.

partnerTeacherPolicy.title: Responsibility and Intellectual Property Policy
partnerTeacherPolicy.subtitle: Applicable to the Advanced AI Application Training Program for Partner Instructors

overview.title: I. Overview
overview.body: This document sets out policies relating to the Security Deposit and Intellectual Property (IP) management for Instructors/Partners participating in the internal training program of the 5200 AI Platform. By registering for the course, the Instructor is deemed to have read, understood and agreed to comply with the following provisions.

deposit.title: 1. Deposit provisions
deposit.amount: Deposit amount: As specified in each intake announcement (Standard amount: 1,000,000 VND).
deposit.purpose: Purpose: To ensure Instructors fully attend training sessions and complete the output product (course).

refund.title: 2. Refund Conditions
refund.intro: 5200 AI Platform commits to refund 100% of the deposit to the Instructor within 07 working days after the Instructor completes the following 3 criteria:
refund.item1: Attendance: Participate in at least 90% of the training program duration.
refund.item2: Output: Complete and submit for approval at least 01 full Course on the 5200 AI system within 30 days of training completion.
refund.item3: Quality: The course meets 5200 AI quality assurance (QA) standards and is approved for publication.

forfeiture.title: 3. Forfeiture
forfeiture.intro: The deposit will be converted into organizational compensation and will not be refunded in the following cases:
forfeiture.item1: Instructor voluntarily drops out of the course without valid reason.
forfeiture.item2: Instructor fails to complete or submit the output product after the committed period (unless 5200 AI agrees to an extension in writing).

ip5200.title: 1. 5200 AI Intellectual Property (Platform-owned)
ip5200.definition: Definition: Includes all curricula, lecture slides, instructional videos, operating procedures (SOPs), sample prompts (AI Prompts) and internal data shared during the training course.
ip5200.usage: Usage: This is exclusive and confidential property of 5200 AI. Instructors may only use it for learning and creating courses on the 5200 AI platform.
ip5200.prohibited: Prohibited: Copying, sharing externally, reselling materials or using them to run competing training is considered a serious breach of confidentiality policy.

ipTeacher.title: 2. Instructor Intellectual Property (Instructor-owned)
ipTeacher.rights: Copyright: The Instructor retains full authorship of course content (videos, accompanying materials) that they directly create based on knowledge acquired.
ipTeacher.responsibility: Responsibility: The Instructor is fully legally responsible for the originality of content and must ensure no infringement of third-party image, audio or content rights.

distribution.title: 3. Distribution Rights & Time-limited Exclusivity
distribution.grant: Grant: The Instructor grants 5200 AI the right to distribute, commercialize and promote the course on 5200 AI's website/app system.
distribution.exclusivity: Exclusivity commitment: The output course (product of this training) must be published EXCLUSIVELY on 5200 AI for the first 06 months. After that period, distribution rights become non-exclusive.

part4.title: IV. Revenue & Quality Mechanism
part4.item1: Revenue share: Revenue is shared according to the cooperation package chosen by the Instructor (Basic 21% / Support 30% / Comprehensive 40%).
part4.item2: Revenue recognition: Course sales revenue is only recognized and allocated to the Instructor's wallet when the learner has completed the course and is assessed as meeting quality standards for publication on the 5200 AI platform.
part4.item3: Protection of interests: This mechanism helps protect Learner interests, thereby enhancing the reputation of both Instructor and Platform.
